data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: Epic decomposed into 5 stories via /dso:preplanning. Walking skeleton: 666f-b07d (file migration). Stories: 666f-b07d (P1, migration), c73a-1918 (P1, hook), ec03-5076 (P1, CLAUDE.md), 50d5-ac2e (P2, doc-writer), 94e3-9711 (P3, docs). Escalation policy: Escalate when blocked. Adversarial review: 3 findings applied (cascade-replan-protocol.md special case in S1, pre-migration inventory in S1, comprehensive grep gate in S3). Dependency graph: S2/S3 depend on S1; S4 depends on S1+S3; S5 depends on all.
